mapper.insert: insert into assistant_sessions ( user_id, title, status, last_message_at, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{status}, #{lastMessageAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: select id, user_id, title, status, last_message_at, created_at, updated_at from assistant_sessions where user_id = #{userId} and status <> 'DELETED' order by last_message_at desc nulls last, id desc
select id, user_id, title, status, last_message_at, created_at, updated_at from assistant_sessions where id = #{sessionId} and user_id = #{userId} and status <> 'DELETED'
